title: E2E Test Suite for EphemeralOS Agent Pipeline

stories.title: E2E test infrastructure and fixtures
acceptanceCriteria: File backend/tests/test_e2e/__init__.py exists
File backend/tests/test_e2e/conftest.py exists with MockApiClient that yields deterministic ApiStreamEvents
MockApiClient supports configurable responses: text-only, tool-call+text, thinking+text
Fixture `e2e_app` creates a real FastAPI app via create_app(BackendHostConfig(api_client=mock))
Fixture `async_client` provides httpx.AsyncClient connected to the test app
pytest marker 'e2e' registered so tests can be run selectively with -m e2e
GET /api/health returns 200 through the test client

stories.title: Chat flow e2e with mock API client
acceptanceCriteria: test_simple_chat_flow posts to /api/chat and parses SSE events from the streaming response
Verifies transcript_item(role=user), assistant_delta, assistant_complete, line_complete events all present
test_chat_with_tool_call configures mock to return a tool_use block, verifies tool_started and tool_completed events
test_chat_with_thinking configures mock to yield ApiThinkingDeltaEvent, verifies thinking_delta events in SSE stream

stories.title: Custom agent e2e with toolkits and skills
acceptanceCriteria: test_custom_agent_with_toolkits spawns an agent with toolkits=['discovery'] and verifies tools are restricted
test_custom_agent_with_system_prompt verifies a custom system_prompt is used (checked via mock client seeing it)
test_skill_injection verifies skills content appears in the system prompt passed to the API client

stories.title: Real API integration tests (Anthropic + MiniMax)
acceptanceCriteria: test_anthropic_live_chat uses real ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, sends simple prompt, gets assistant response via SSE
test_minimax_live_chat uses real MINIMAX_API_KEY with openai format, sends prompt, gets response
Both tests skip cleanly with pytest.mark.skipif when env var not set
Both tests marked with @pytest.mark.e2e and @pytest.mark.live

stories.title: All tests collect and pass
acceptanceCriteria: pytest backend/tests/test_e2e/ --co collects all tests without import errors
pytest backend/tests/test_e2e/ -m 'e2e and not live' runs all mock-based tests and they pass
File structure: __init__.py, conftest.py, test_chat_flow.py, test_agents.py, test_live_api.py
